Appearances:
Plaintiff Shoreview Apartments, LP. is present. Represented by Brandon Ceasar
Attorney Justin Brewer appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shaunte M. Minner is present.
Attorney Kristin s. Cornuelle representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jean Mileff, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The trial date of MAR-12-2012 is vacated. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. (501)
